messages.content: turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, Check for damages and wear
Is there any damage or wear?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, Check for loose bolts
Are there any loose bolts?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, Check the battery DC voltage and its charger
Is the battery DC voltage and its charger functioning properly?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, but no being the answer positively, Check the battery DC voltage and its charger
Is the battery DC voltage and its charger not functioning properly?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, but no being the answer positively, Check the room lighting and replace busted lights if any
Is the room lighting functioning properly with no busted lights?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no and "no" answer is the positive answer, Check the room lighting and replace busted lights if any
Are all the lights in the room working without any needing replacement?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, Conduct housekeeping as needed
Is housekeeping needed?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, Check the fire extinguishers and note if they are in good operating condition
Are the fire extinguishers in good operating condition?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, but no being the answer positively, Check the fire extinguishers and note if they are in good operating condition
Are the fire extinguishers not in good operating condition?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, but no being the answer positively, Check if the door lock set condition is good
Is the door lock set condition not good?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, but no being the positive answer, Check if grounding conductors are intact
Are the grounding conductors not intact?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Turn on exhaust fan
Is the exhaust fan turned on?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check for unusual noise and vibration
Is there any unusual noise or vibration?

turn this statement into a yes or no question, Switch on Exhaust Fan no. 8 (EF-8) and Exhaust Fan no. 11 (EF-11) for
commercial and residential LVSG Rooms
Are Exhaust Fan no. 8 (EF-8) and Exhaust Fan no. 11 (EF-11) for the commercial and residential LVSG Rooms switched on?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the control panel's status for tripped devices.
Is there any tripped device in the control panel's status?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check flow meter status and record reading
Has the flow meter status been checked and the reading recorded?
turn this statement into a question answerable by yes or no, but no being the positive answer, Check flow meter status and record reading
Has the flow meter status not been checked and the reading not recorded?

turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the control panel's status for tripped devices, troubleshoot, and fix them
as needed
Have the control panel's status for tripped devices been checked, and if found, have they been troubleshooted and fixed as needed?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check flow meter status and record reading
Has the flow meter status been checked and the reading recorded?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the Sequential Batch Reactor (SBR) tank effluent color
Has the effluent color of the Sequential Batch Reactor (SBR) tank been checked?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Remove solid waste from the bar screen
Has the solid waste been removed from the bar screen?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the chlorinator tank level and condition of the tubing
Has the chlorinator tank level and condition of the tubing been checked?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the operation of the dosing pump
Is the dosing pump operating correctly?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check for any abnormal sounds from the equipment
Are there any abnormal sounds coming from the equipment?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, no being the positive answer, Check for any abnormal sounds from the equipment
Are there no abnormal sounds coming from the equipment?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, yes being the positive answer, Check for any abnormal sounds from the equipment
Are there any abnormal sounds coming from the equipment?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the oil level of the Sequential Batch Reactor (SBR) tank
Has the oil level of the Sequential Batch Reactor (SBR) tank been checked?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check for dust particles on the control panel and clean
Has the control panel been checked for dust particles and cleaned?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the equalization tank
Has the equalization tank been checked?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check for loose bolts and unusual vibrations
Are there any loose bolts or unusual vibrations?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check if the supply fan is operational at 8 am
Is the supply fan operational at 8 am?

turn this statement into a yes or no question, Alternately operate every other day, Exhaust Fan no. 9A (EF-9A) and Exhaust
Fan No. 9B (EF-9B).
Are Exhaust Fan no. 9A (EF-9A) and Exhaust Fan No. 9B (EF-9B) operated alternately every other day?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Record both the Sewage Treatment Plant gas detector levels PPM
Have the gas detector levels PPM at the Sewage Treatment Plant been recorded?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Conduct housekeeping as needed
Has housekeeping been conducted as needed?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check the fire extinguishers
Have the fire extinguishers been checked?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check if the door lockset condition is good and fix or replace it as needed.
Is the door lockset condition good, and has it been fixed or replaced as needed?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Inspect piping for leakages
Has the piping been inspected for leakages?
turn this statement into a yes or no question, Check for loose bolts & unusual vibration
Are there any loose bolts or unusual vibration?
